MAIN_INSIGHT: Wyche Hut is a standout listing — 5.0 rating across 70 reviews, superhost status, and Guest Favourite badge. The title leads well, photos are strong, and the nightly rate reflects what the market supports. Your next move is expansion, not repair.
QUICK_WIN: Duplicate your current Airbnb listing copy to Vrbo. Your content is strong enough to convert on a second platform with minimal adaptation — and Vrbo reaches a different audience who rarely use Airbnb.
FREE_TIP: A/B test your cover photo by swapping it for a different hero shot for 30 days. With 28 photos and a 5.0 rating, a stronger first image could nudge your click-through rate and earn you a few more reviews.
PLATFORM_2_DESC: Different audience — families, longer stays, fewer competitors. Same property, new market.
PLATFORM_2_BENCH: £6k–10k additional per year for well-listed properties
PLATFORM_3_DESC: Massive international reach. Fills gaps between Airbnb bookings, strong for shoulder seasons.
BRANDON_NOTE_LINE_1: Wyche Hut has earned its 5.0 — 70 reviews and a Guest Favourite badge aren't luck.
BRANDON_NOTE_LINE_2: The opportunity isn't fixing anything. It's reaching more guests on more channels.
BRANDON_NOTE_LINE_3: The full report gives you platform-ready copy so you don't have to adapt it yourself.
